caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with gold detailing, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a white banner features the words "EMPOWER HUSTLE" and five black stars. On-screen graphics include the "BOSS TALK 101" logo and a circular "PODCAST" logo. A screen behind the man shows blurred text, including "TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera. He begins by looking forward with a slight smile, then turns his gaze slightly to the right, maintains that position, and continues to look in that direction across the subsequent moments. His clothing and the surrounding studio equipment remain constant throughout the clip.
